---------------------------

Joakim Biography

Since 1999, when he released his debut album as Joakim Lone Octet (an electro-jazz exercise in style on Future Talk, the experimental sub-label of Versatile), Joakim has been a tough musician to pinpoint. An ex piano student at the Conservatory, the man has taken great efforts to avoid being pigeonholed and has grown on the outskirts of the French Touch and international Club scenes, becoming one of their major players but refusing to permanently associate with any crew, current, style or genre.

Year after year, Joakim has gathered experiences that confirm his global vision of music and explored many facets of the musical spectrum: a musician with five albums under his belt; a label founder and manager (the fantastic Tigersushi and the recent vinyl-only Crowdspacer imprint); a self-taught graphic designer (he designs his record covers and most of the label's artworks); a DJ whose huge musical spectrum makes him equally at home at Panorama Bar, and outdoor rave or an art show afterparty; a fashion enthusiast (he launched Tigersushi Furs with his cousin); a producer (for Panico, Poni Hoax, Zombie Zombie, Y.O.U., Montevideo\u2026); a high-profile remixer who sends the tracks he works on into another galaxy; a sound designer for catwalks (Chanel, Margiela, Balenciaga); and a step into contemporary art, working on Camille Henrot's installations and videos (who won the Silver Lion at the 2013 Venice Biennale with the vid

213.desc:
[Starborne Presents Cascadia Festival 2017 : a summertime celebration featuring 4 nights & 3 days of camping with live music, DJs, dancing, art installations & exhibits, workshops, performances, artisan vending & the spirit of community. 
Cascadia is held at the Masonic Family Park, a beautiful campground location nestled in the woods, next to a river, in Granite Falls, WA, just 75 minutes north of Seattle!]

CASCADIA FESTIVAL 2017 PRESENTS...

SHAMELESS SHOWCASE \u0040 THE LODGE
Sunday 16 July, 9pm-5am

Featuring:
+++David Scuba (Superfreq, Desert Hearts, LA)+++

Raised on a diet of underground house music in the legendary confines of New York's Twilo during the late 1990s, David Scuba has now emerged as one of California's most in demand DJs spinning the world over. At the same time as holding down an arduous day job, David somehow manages to produce music, throw events, DJ worldwide, book talent, book Superfreq into festivals & still find time to be everybody's favorite Uncle Scoobs. It's called dedication.
 
David is co-owner of Superfreq with Mr.C where he holds down resident DJ duties on a regular basis. An inventive & exciting turntable technician, David's DJ talents spread much further afield, taking in events across the globe including WMC, DEMF, Burning Man, Resolute New York, Desert Hearts, Superfreq London & Superfreq's on-going annual residency at BPM Festival in Mexico, playing alongside the likes of Carl Cox, Nic Fanciulli, M.A.N.D.Y, Lee Burridge, Claude Vonstroke, Doc Martin, Marc Houle, Inxec, Bushwacka, Jay Tripwire, Kate Simko, Chlo\u00e9, DJ T, Simon Baker & Nitin to name just a few.  
 
David coordinates Superfreq events in Los Angeles having thrown events at Avalon, Sound, Le Jardin, Los Globos, Dim Mak & a host of underground warehouse & villa parties. David is also working with Mr.C on hosting Superfreq in London with recent events at Fabric, The Steelyard & various underground pop-up warehouse spaces in the English capitol. Superfreq have London events forthcoming at Bloc, Red Gallery & of course Fabric later this year.
 
As well as producing & releasing a multitude of his own solo tracks and remixes for Superfreq, David has released music on Riff Raff, Desert Hearts, Veryverywrongindeed, Design Forms, We Are Here Music, AA Trax, LW Recordings, Carrillo Music, NOSI Music, Family Grooves, Motek & Compatible Music.
 
David has his new collaboration EP with Dance Spirit, a remix for Mr.C & also his own solo EP due for release in 2017 on Superfreq, all demonstrating that David has become an essential producer of darkened club beats that really stand-out, rising above the norm in a globally oversaturated market.
 
They say that the cream always rises to the top & this is definitely the case for David Scuba who's future as an ever-rising star is huge, as clearly demonstrated with his recent ascension on a global level.
 
Media Links:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DavidScubaMusic
Twitter: https://twitter.com/DavidScubaMusi

218.desc:
Love and community conquer hate on Sunday, March 12th at Fred Wildlife Refuge! Join the Yo Yo Yoga family for a loving, empowering, lustrous Manipura Chakra focused yoga flow with live DJ and visuals; a true audio/visual immersive yoga flow.

We chose this theme because our Manipura chakra is our center of self empowerment, willpower, self-discipline, confidence and transformation. The energy of this chakra allows you to transform inertia into action and movement. It allows you to meet challenges and move forward in your life.

The message of the third chakra is: You have the power to choose. You can choose to achieve your life purpose or you can live out your karma or past experiences. What do you choose? Do you choose love, light and healing? Do you accept that you have the power to choose? Do you feel a sense of freedom when you make a choice? 

During dark times it is important to stay strong to persevere, to chose love over hate and keep that fire burning bright.

Yoga Instructor: Joe Burley
DJ: Recess
VJ: Killing Frenzy

We will have 2 session times to choose from...

4:00-6:00pm
6:00-8:00pm

Each session will include a live DJ and live VJ along with an instructor leading a vinyasa/yoga flow. Free juice, kombucha and snacks from our vendors as always. 

$20 pre-sale 
$25 at the door 
25\u0025 of all profits to the ACLU of Washington State
https://www.aclu.org/affiliate/washington 

Please note: This is a BYOM event, please bring your own mat if you have one, we only have a few to share. Thank you so much!!!

All ages!!

Here's a little bit more about Yo Yo Yoga...
http://www.yoyoyogaproject.com/

221.desc:
Yo Yo Yoga, Shameless & Chance of Rain Present :

THE DIVINE MOVEMENT WITH GINA TURNER, JOE BURLEY, TIM ROTHSCHILD & RECESS (DJ) 
[Advance tickets only. No CoR passes for Yo Yo Yoga] 

A YOGA, MEDITATION, NUMEROLOGY AND DANCE PARTY

The Divine Movement is an event concept that gathers like minded beings to go beyond the traditional club experience. It combines music, yoga, meditation, tarot, numerology, massage, healings and workshops in a unique and welcoming space.

Meet the instructors:

GINA TURNER 
Gina Turner is the ultimate multi-hyphenate. Raised in New York City, Gina Turner is a yoga teaching, internationally touring, multi-label releasing DJ, producer, radio host, new mother and label boss. To successfully balance all aspects of her life, Gina was certified with her 300 hr YTT through Yoga Alliance certified Frog Lotus International, with a specific certification in Vinyasa Flow. Gina is also a certified Prenatal Yoga Instructor with a long time passion for Ashtanga and Inyengar Yoga.

TIM ROTHSCHILD
Founder of The Third Thing Network and Co-Founder of The Divine Movement, Tim Rothschild is an explorer of consciousness, dedicating his life to healing work and finding innovative ways to expand the collective human experience. As a Nondual Kabbalistic Healer, Reiki practitioner, Numerologist, Tarot reader, comedian and entertainer, Tim has ventured through the paranormal, conspiratorial, and mystical realms. He uses his experiences playing "psychedelic detective" in order to cleanse the doors of perception, allowing the individual to be in relationship with reality just as it is - kickstarting the process of freedom, enabling them to feel ALIVE again!

JOE BURLEY
Joe Burley:Forever interested in myth, wonder and the secrets of the universe.
It was at the age of twenty that I really took my first step to become a life long practitioner of yoga. My physical body had been critically injured, after a long recover it was the practice of yoga that truly healed. My practice stayed with me through college and my first attempts to start a career. By paths of the universe I decided to take vinyasa yoga teacher training in 2013. I love the connection yoga brings, from the universe flowing all around to the energy  hidden deeper within. 

Meet the DJ: 
RECESS 
Recess Shameless has been getting down with Shameless Productions crew for over 12 years now and has an illustrious tenure in the NW's underground music scene. His DJ sets often reflect Shameless' aesthetic by focusing on forward thinking music while cherishing the gems of the past. He'll span the various ranges of house/disco and may weave through techno, bass and funky, depending upon the party. For a yoga set he'll dig deep into his chill/eclectic crates as he did at the Yo Yo Yoga series (ETG) to help create a unique experience for all.
http://www.simplyshameless.com/
https://soundcloud.com/itsrecess/yo-yo-chill-mixed-by-recess


DOORS - 10am
Bring your own mat and towel.

10:30a-11a  Medi

229.desc:
Starborne Presents Cascadia Festival : a summertime celebration featuring 4 nights & 3 days of camping with live music, DJs, dancing, art, workshops, performances, artisan vending & the spirit of community. Cascadia is held at the Masonic Family Park, a beatiful campground location nestled in the woods, next to a river, in Granite Falls, WA, just 75 minutes north of Seattle.

SHAMELESS SHOWCASE
SUNDAY JULY 24TH, 2016 \u0040 CASCADIA FESTIVAL 

We're proud to once again close down the festival with an all star cast of Seattle locals, techno and family. Plus Clarian is joining us in the Lodge! This one starts at 9p and goes until 5a (eye of the tiger, baby!). 

Plus Yo Yo Yoga will be warming things up with Audrey and Recess at the helm starting at 7p for those that want to stretch then dance.
https://www.facebook.com/events/292617111071508/


+++Clarian (Kompakt Records)+++

Rumour has it that while Clarian was institutionalized at a human testing facility in the North Coast, he began song-writing as an occupational therapy to reconstruct visions of unknown origin. Clarian was released from the clinic in 2010 opted through sponsorship by a private organization known as COD for reasons that remain unclear. Since then, Clarian has become a pivotal force in underground electronic communities across the world through a stunning array of music productions, collaborations, and global live performance.

Combining the warm hum and factory grit of analog machinery, sequencers, and haunted strings, his tracks transport the listener into alternate states of mind. Some have described it as: \"similar to an intensified cannabinoid induced state of sexual consciousness\". Laced in homemade beats and toxic hooks, Clarian is on the fringe between experimental house and pseudo pop, re-imagining tones into an addictive cocktail with his signature dance floor poetry.

Clarian continues to take an uncharted path of unwinding curves and magnetic spheres. His EP 'Chemical Gardens' on Visionquest intertwined the zeitgeist in 2012 and since he has released records on game changing labels: Turbo, Life And Death, Supplement Facts, Rumors and My Favorite Robot (to name a few). He performs on stages, clubs, festivals, basements and sunrises worldwide with some of the underground's most influential and elusive artists. 

In the summers, Clarian shadows the Berlin club scene where he spends his time off from touring mostly in a basement dreaming up his web of sound. Fronting as A&R for Seth Troxler's new indie label Soft Touch of the exotic and strange, he serves as the artistic backbone and inaugurated the label with its first release - \"Is There Light At The End\". Favouring a pastime for science fiction as well as a whiskey purist and chess enthusiast, Clarian is gaining a cult following of danceaholics who seem to relish in his often reckless exploits and obsessions of music research and experimentation.
https://soundcloud.com/clariannorth
https://www.residentadvisor.net/

254.desc:
Shameless Audio 003 - Luke Mandala's Bacon Jam (with Christian Martin remix) - out on Beatport September NOW!

Purchase the release on Beatport at:
http://www.beatport.com/release/bacon-jam/1369310

Preview the release on Soundcloud at:
https://soundcloud.com/shameless-audio/sets/luke-mandala-bacon-jam-sa003

Check out comments and video form our outrageous release party, The Breakfast Club (featuring Christian Martin, Pezzner, Luke Mandala, Codebase and MANY MORE) at:
https://www.facebook.com/events/626199484115519

This September 29th, Shameless Audio is serving up a tasty dose of \"Bacon Jam,\" a bassy new tech house cut from veteran Northwest producer Luke Mandala that's remixed by Christian Martin. Both versions of the track are dripping with ridiculously sweet low end and juicy vocal samples, while each offers a unique sound capable of fitting into a wide variety of DJ and dance floor pallets.

Original:
Luke Mandala's original features relentless yet complexly evolving low end that starts with a more traditional tech house sound and gradually morphs into a driving yet melodic bass house vibe. A chopped up, distorted vocal sample and highly layered hand percussion drive the track forward, and there is only the slightest garnish of an acidy breakdown before it kicks back into full gear. This will treat your speakers like bacon treats a Bloody Mary.

Christian Martin Remix:
Christian Martin takes the track's already trippy vocals and percussion and gives them an otherworldly, dub-drenched feel. Like Luke's, the low end grows over the track, but has much more of Christian's signature 808 break and sine bass feel that fans of dirtybird would appreciate. Ethereal pads form the melodic place setting, but it's Christian's super squelchy, party rocking lead that serves as the secret ingredient. This is all West Coast tongue and groove.

Please check back here soon for the Beatport link!

Click the link below (or copy/paste) to sign up for Shameless Productions's email list\u2026
http://eepurl.com/iHr_9

------------------------


++TARA BROOKS (LA)++
(Subtract Music)

In late 2007, when Tara Danielle Brooks put her first needle on a record, she had neither idea nor expectation that her passion for music would soon become her life-long career. She learned on vinyl using her natural ear for music. Through this route, she escaped into the sounds that helped her discover a new meaning to life. Experiencing magical nights at parties and festivals in Southern California, Tara discovered the power to be moved and touched by electronic dance music, causing pure enlightenment. She's a self-taught deejay who found her destiny: To express creativity through music.
Tara's passion turned into an addiction, landing her gigs from all over So Cal, Vegas, Miami, New York, internationally and more. She's opened and closed for many great dj's including Plastikman, Green Velvet, James Zabiela, Victor Calderone, Eric Prydz, Erick Morillo, Joseph Capriati, Alan Fitzpatrick, The Martinez Brothers, Sander Van Doorn etc. She plays for Insomniac, The Bpm festival, Wmc Space Miami, Drais LV/LA, Marquee Day Club, played 4 events during her first experience at Burning Man and has 8 lined up for 2013. \"It was the most magical, phenomenal, twisted experience of my life and i've never felt an energy so beautiful before\".
Her heart lies in techno, tech house, deep house, older progressive, open minded and moved by a more underground sound and feeling. Influences include John Digweed, Victor Calderone, Lee Burridge, Joseph Capriati, Richie Hawtin, Pig & Dan, Los Suruba, Guy Gerber, Nicole Moudabour, Gaiser, Tube & Berger, Hernan Cattaneo, Audiofly & others like minded. Known for powerful drops, driving rolling baselines, beautiful emotional melodies and techno with a dark groove while still uplifting, she focuses on sounds that have the ability to touch the soul.
Dedicated and addicted to production, she hopes to move you with her sounds, taking you on a unique and special journey, touching u so deeply.
http://tarabrooksmusic.com

This Thursday one of our long time local favorites will be celebrating her birthday and taking over the decks on the deck with her friends. Come join us!

THURSDAY SEPTEMBER 4TH
6p-10p

>> EOC Bday Bash \u003C\u003C

FEATURING FUTUREWIFE & CASEWAG!!!

263.desc:
Join Shameless Audio at Kremwerk on Friday, June 27th for the release of SA002, Codebase's \"Down for the Count,\" an acid and rave piano-drenched dance floor packer featuring remixes by Deepchild, Distal, Aur0ra and Adlib!  

In celebration, we will be throwing a ridiculously awesome party featuring Codebase and our favorite globetrotting Aussie, Deepchild.  Of course, all your favorite Shameless residents will be providing support, along with the usual surprise or three...

Featuring
Deepchild (live) - Sidney/Berlin - Trapez, Cohenshi, Thoughtless Music - Shameless Audio
Codebase (live) - Seattle - Shameless Audio, Roam Recordings, Force Inc, Disco Couture
Aur0ra (live) AKA Joe Bellingham and Jon Joslin
Recess - DJ - Shameless
Adlib - DJ - Shameless
Tyson Wittrock - DJ - Shameless


Shameless Audio's second outing, Codebase's "Down For The Count," is a diverse release spanning dance music genres and generations.  Codebase merges the classic and the new with an acid and rave-piano drenched dance floor packer.  Berlin-based Deepchild's Dub Mix  delivers the dubby warehouse techno love, while bass music maestro Distal explores the outer regions of post dubstep space.  Aur0ra (Shameless resident Joe Bellngham with vocalist Jon Joslin) and Shameless resident Devin Kelly (AKA Adlib) each bring the dance floor heat, Aur0ra with a vocal deep house remix and Adlib with straight-up acid.  Tune in, turn on, turn up the Shameless Audio.

Kremwerk - June 27th, 2014
9pm-late
21+

www.simplyshameless.com
Shameless - Keeping it weird since 2003

264.desc:
As most of you know, Shameless and many of our friends are part of a merry group of Seattle folks known as BoomCamp (AKA Sea Camp).  We will all be reppin' Seattle hard at the final edition of Esthetic Evolution, over yonder in Idaho, for the Summer Solstice.  We will certainly need to decompress together.  Come early to share your stories, memories, and a drink or six!

As all of you absolutely should know, June 27th marks the debut of our second Shameless Audio release, Codebase's \"Down For The Count,\" with remixes by Deepchild, Distal, Aur0ra and Devin Kelly (AKA Adlib).  We will be celebrating the release that night with a heady party at Kremwerk, with Codebase and Deepchild at the helm.  Clearly, we need to spend the entire evening there.

AND for those of you who've made it THIS far, you can join us between 5:00-8:00 pm on the 27th to celebrate, prepare and get down FOR FREE, and get a stamp for free admission to the main event later!  We will also have our now infamous screen printing station, with prints from Shameless AND Boomcamp/Sea Camp, along with music from some of your favorite Shameless and Boomcamp/Sea Camp DJs!

With DJ sets by 
VonDewey
Lu Ying

in. other. words. happy. hour. party.

Kremwerk.  5-8pm.  Free to be you and me.

MAIN EVENT LATER ON>>>
https://www.facebook.com/events/781472851886031/

266.desc:
Hello Shameless family, friends and fans!

Join Shameless this Valentine's Day in celebrating the official Beatport debut of Shameless Audio 001 - Joe Bellingham's \"Our Reflection Blues\" EP, featuring remixes by Smash TV and Ghosts on Tape!

Sample it here\u2026 https://soundcloud.com/shameless-audio/sets/joe-bellingham-our-reflection  

Read below for information on the release, and please come back here after 02/14 for a direct link to the release's Beatport page!

Also, don't forget to support our annual anti-valentine's awesomeness, My Bloody Valentine is Shameless, happening that evening.  Click the link below for more information!

https://www.facebook.com/events/440693432697696

Artist: Joe Bellingham
Track Title: Our Reflection Blues
Remixes by Smash TV, Ghosts on Tape & Shameless
Label: Shameless Audio 001
Release Date: Feb 14th, 2014

After throwing a near constant stream of legendary parties across Seattle and the greater Northwest over the past 10 years, Shameless Productions is finally releasing it's own music under the Shameless Audio label, with Joe Bellingham's "Our Reflection Blues" as it's debut release. Much like the vibe established over the last decade of event production, Our Reflection Blues is a forward-thinking, genre-spanning dancefloor rocker. Joe Bellingham's original and the Shameless mix are spacey, classic sounding house cuts driven by a simple but captivating piano line and moody vocals. Veteran Berlin duo Smash TV and San Francisco's Icee Hot label boss Ghosts On Tape are on remix duties. Both offer their own unique interpretations, with Smash TV dishing out some seriously techy big room house and Ghosts on Tape going the late night warehouse dub techno route.

Joe Bellingham's original mix is a sexy feeling number that showcases stellar vocal and piano leads riding on an evolving bassline. The track really opens up in the middle, entering a dubby, jazzy realm that few contemporary house tracks achieve, without ever losing the dancefloor.   The constantly shifting interplay between the leads, bassline and percussion makes it impossible not to groove. The track would like to remind you that right now, everyone is talking at your vibe.

The Shameless mix is more funky and backed with solid, punchy kicks and percussion. The whole thing has a classic house vibe, mixed with a trippy, atmospheric feel that really ties the room together. The track starts out hot, then relentlessly drives the groove home from start to finish. It peaks with a subtle but extremely sexy drop reminding us all of our favorite dancefloor and bedroom moments.

Ghosts On Tape delivers a dubby and subtly psychedelic techno interpretation that is thickly laden with spacey sweeps, distorted vocals and that perfect late-night warehouse feel. The track starts out stripped-down and almost reserved, then gradually climbs to a crescendo of dark, distorted and oddly classic leads over layered, driving percussion. It will confuse you, elate you and make
